raw_text: Sylius is an Open Source eCommerce Framework on Symfony. Sylius API filters ProductPriceOrderFilter and TranslationOrderNameAndLocaleFilter pass user-supplied order direction values directly to Doctrine's orderBy() without validation. An attacker can inject arbitrary DQL. The issue is fixed in versions: 1.9.12, 1.10.16, 1.11.17, 1.12.23, 1.13.15, 1.14.18, 2.0.16, 2.1.12, 2.2.3 and above.
